---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? Who is it for?

## Proposed solution
What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## Use case
A specific scenario where this would be valuable.

## Additional context
Mockups, diagrams, references, etc.

## Are you willing to contribute this?
[ ] Yes, I can implement it
[ ] I can help with design/review
[ ] I just want to use it
